hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm[[:space:]]+(-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z]*f|-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*[rR]|-[rR][[:space:]]+-f|-f[[:space:]]+-[rR]|--recursive|--force))|(find[[:space:]].*-delete)|(truncate[[:space:]]+-s[[:space:]]*0)|(git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+(-f|--force)([[:space:]]|$))|(git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard)|(DROP[[:space:]]+TABLE)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험할 수 있는 명령(best-effort 가드 — 보안 경계가 아님). 의도한 것이면 직접 실행하세요.' >&2; exit 1; fi
